package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for password_stored_as_plaintext: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Store password hashes instead of plaintext, e.g., bcrypt hash in a byte array
type SecureUser struct {
    ID        string
    Username  string
    Password  []byte   `gorm:"column:password_hash"`
    Passwd    []byte   `gorm:"column:passwd_hash"`
    Pwd       []byte   `gorm:"column:pwd_hash"`
    Email     string
}

func HashPassword(password string) ([]byte, error) {
    return bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(password), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
}
